sentences.target: Le magasin annonce la fermeture à dix-neuf heures.
sentences.reading: /lə maɡazɛ̃ anɔ̃s la fɛʁmətyʁ a diznœf œʁ/

translations.fr: Le magasin annonce la fermeture à dix-neuf heures.
translations.ipa: /lə maɡazɛ̃ anɔ̃s la fɛʁmətyʁ a diznœf œʁ/
translations.en: The store announces closing at seven p.m.
translations.es: La tienda anuncia el cierre a las siete de la tarde.
translations.de: Das Geschäft kündigt an, dass es um 19 Uhr schließt.
translations.it: Il negozio annuncia la chiusura alle 19.
translations.zh-Hans: 商店宣布将于晚上七点关门。
translations.yue: 舖頭宣布晚上七點收舖。
translations.pt: A loja anuncia o fechamento às 19h.
translations.he: החנות מודיעה על סגירה בשבע בערב.
translations.vi: Cửa hàng thông báo sẽ đóng cửa lúc 7 giờ tối.
translations.ar: يعلن المتجر الإغلاق في الساعة السابعة مساءً.
translations.nl: De winkel kondigt de sluiting om 19.00 uur aan.
translations.hu: Az üzlet bejelenti, hogy 19 órakor zár.
translations.hi: दुकान शाम सात बजे बंद होने की घोषणा करती है.
translations.el: Το κατάστημα ανακοινώνει το κλείσιμο στις 19:00.
translations.cs: Obchod oznamuje, že se zavírá v 19:00.
translations.ja: 店は午後7時に閉店をお知らせしています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun 'magasin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'la fermeture' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object 'fermeture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object meaning 'closing/closure'.
Preposition introducing a time-of-day expression.
Cardinal numeral specifying the hour.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the time phrase ('à dix-neuf heures').

sentences.target: On attend la fermeture des portes du métro.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ la fɛʁmətyʁ de pɔʁt dy metʁo/

translations.fr: On attend la fermeture des portes du métro.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ la fɛʁmətyʁ de pɔʁt dy metʁo/
translations.en: We’re waiting for the metro doors to close.
translations.es: Estamos esperando a que se cierren las puertas del metro.
translations.de: Wir warten darauf, dass sich die U-Bahn-Türen schließen.
translations.it: Stiamo aspettando che si chiudano le porte della metropolitana.
translations.ko: 우리는 지하철 문이 닫히기를 기다리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在等地铁车门关闭。
translations.yue: 我哋喺等地鐵車門閂埋。
translations.ru: Мы ждём, когда закроются двери метро.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando as portas do metrô se fecharem.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ cửa tàu điện ngầm đóng lại.
translations.nl: We wachten tot de metrodeuren sluiten.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо, коли зачиняться двері метро.
translations.hi: हम मेट्रो के दरवाजे बंद होने का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Czekamy, aż drzwi metra się zamkną.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε να κλείσουν οι πόρτες του μετρό.
translations.nb: Vi venter på at metrodørene skal lukkes.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på att tunnelbanedörrarna ska stängas.
translations.ro: Așteptăm să se închidă ușile metroului.
translations.cs: Čekáme, až se zavřou dveře metra.
translations.da: Vi venter på, at metrodørene lukker.
translations.ja: 私たちは地下鉄のドアが閉まるのを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun; subject ('one/we').
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'fermeture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase.
Contracted preposition 'de + les'; introduces the complement 'portes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of 'fermeture'.
Contracted preposition 'de + le'; introduces 'métro', specifying which doors.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'portes'.

sentences.target: La fermeture éclair de mon sac est coincée.
sentences.reading: /la fɛʁmətyʁ eklɛʁ də mɔ̃ sak ɛ kwɛ̃se/

translations.fr: La fermeture éclair de mon sac est coincée.
translations.ipa: /la fɛʁmətyʁ eklɛʁ də mɔ̃ sak ɛ kwɛ̃se/
translations.en: The zipper on my bag is stuck.
translations.es: La cremallera de mi mochila está atascada.
translations.de: Der Reißverschluss an meinem Rucksack klemmt.
translations.it: La cerniera del mio zaino è bloccata.
translations.pt: O zíper da minha mochila está emperrado.
translations.vi: Khoá kéo trên ba lô của tôi bị kẹt.
translations.nl: De rits van mijn ryggsäck zit vast.
translations.hi: मेरे बैग की ज़िप फँस गई है.
translations.pl: Zamek w moim plecaku się zaciął.
translations.el: Το φερμουάρ της τσάντας μου έχει κολλήσει.
translations.nb: Glidelåsen på sekken min har satt seg fast.
translations.sv: Dragkedjan på min ryggsäck har fastnat.
translations.ro: Fermoarul de la rucsacul meu s-a blocat.
translations.cs: Zip na mém batohu se zasekl.
translations.da: Lynlåsen på min rygsæk sidder fast.
translations.ja: バッグのファスナーが噛んでしまった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'fermeture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; first element of the compound 'fermeture éclair' (= zipper).
Common noun; second element in the compound 'fermeture éclair' meaning 'zipper'.
Preposition marking a possessive relation.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; agrees with 'sac'.
Common noun, masculine singular; possessee governed by 'de'.
Auxiliary 'être', present, 3rd person singular; copula linking subject to predicate adjective.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine singular; predicate agreeing with 'fermeture'.

sentences.target: Tu annonces la fermeture du café, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty anɔ̃s la fɛʁmətyʁ dy kafe sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu annonces la fermeture du café, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty anɔ̃s la fɛʁmətyʁ dy kafe sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Please announce the café is closing.
translations.es: Por favor, anuncia que el café va a cerrar.
translations.de: Bitte kündige an, dass das Café schließt.
translations.it: Per favore, annuncia che il caffè sta per chiudere.
translations.zh-Hans: 请通知大家咖啡馆要打烊了。
translations.yue: 唔該你宣佈咖啡店要收舖。
translations.pt: Por favor, anuncia que o café vai fechar.
translations.vi: Làm ơn thông báo quán cà phê sắp đóng cửa.
translations.ar: من فضلك أعلن أن المقهى سيغلق.
translations.nl: Kondig alsjeblieft aan dat het café sluit.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, оголоси, що кафе зачиняється.
translations.hu: Kérlek, jelentsd be, hogy a kávézó bezár.
translations.hi: कृपया घोषणा करो कि कैफ़े बंद हो रहा है.
translations.pl: Proszę, ogłoś, że kawiarnia się zamyka.
translations.el: Παρακαλώ ανακοίνωσε ότι η καφετέρια κλείνει.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, kunngjør että kafeen stenger.
translations.id: Tolong umumkan bahwa kafe akan tutup.
translations.sv: Var snäll och meddela att kaféet stänger.
translations.ro: Te rog anunță că cafeneaua se închide.
translations.cs: Prosím oznam, že se kavárna zavírá.
translations.da: Meld venligst ud, at caféen lukker.
translations.ja: カフェの閉店を案内してください。

Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'fermeture'.

Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'fermeture'.
Elided subordinating conjunction 'si' before 'il'; part of the set phrase 's'il te plaît'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'plaît'.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular, indirect object; complement of 'plaît'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in the polite formula 's'il te plaît' ('please').
